name: Chocolate Obsession
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 1 cup brown sugar, flour, cocoa powder, and baking powder in a bowl.
Whisk together milk, melted butter, and vanilla extract separately.
Pour the wet mixture over the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
Spread evenly in the bottom of a 3-quart crock pot.
2. In another bowl, mix remaining brown sugar, cocoa powder, and almonds (if using).
Sprinkle this mixture evenly over the top of the batter.
Pour hot water into the crock pot, making sure it reaches just below the surface
of the batter.
3. Cover and cook on high for about 2 hours, or until a toothpick inserted in
the center comes out clean. Do not cook on low for an extended period.
4. Remove from heat and let cool slightly. Serve warm pudding in individual bowls,
topped with vanilla ice cream if desired.
